title: Issue-specific information releases - Ministry of Education
content:
Ngā tukunga pārongo e hāngai pū ana ki ētahi take

## Issue-specific information releases
Find out about the topics we have released packages of information about, where there is a high degree of public interest.
- Legal and compliance 1
- Policies and regulations 1
- Te ihirangi paetukutuku mō te whakakotahi ki te COVID-19 Unite Against COVID-19 website content The Government publicly released documents relating to decisions about its response to COVID-19 on the former Unite Against COVID-19 webpage.
The Government publicly released documents relating to decisions about its response to COVID-19 on the former Unite Against COVID-19 webpage.
- Te Rōpū Kaitohu Whare Wānanga University Advisory Group We formed the University Advisory Group (UAG) in March 2024 at the request of the Government.
We formed the University Advisory Group (UAG) in March 2024 at the request of the Government.
- Tahua Pūtea Urupare Nonoi 2020/2021 Urgent Response Fund 2020/2021 The $50 million Urgent Response Fund was distributed in 2020/21, to support learners affected by the COVID-19 lockdowns.
The $50 million Urgent Response Fund was distributed in 2020/21, to support learners affected by the COVID-19 lockdowns.
- Te hauhau i ngā kura Ventilation in schools Good ventilation is important in minimising the risk of airborne transmission of the virus that causes COVID-19.
Good ventilation is important in minimising the risk of airborne transmission of the virus that causes COVID-19.
- Te whakahoahoa anō i te Akoranga Ringarehe Vocational Education and Training (VET) redesign The following documents have been released on the disestablishment of Te Pūkenga and other proposed changes to the VET system.
The following documents have been released on the disestablishment of Te Pūkenga and other proposed changes to the VET system.
- He Anga Whakawātea Wānanga Wānanga Enabling Framework The Education and Training Amendment Bill (No 3) has been introduced, proposing a new Wānanga Enabling Framework.
The Education and Training Amendment Bill (No 3) has been introduced, proposing a new Wānanga Enabling Framework.
